message: ci: install graalvm ce 23 for windows jobs

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,17 @@ jobs:
         shell: pwsh
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Install GraalVM CE 23 and set JAVA_HOME/GRAALVM_HOME
+        run: |
+          choco install graalvm-ce-java23 -y
+          $graal = Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files\GraalVM" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
+          if (-not $graal) { throw "GraalVM not found after install" }
+          $env:GRAALVM_HOME = $graal.FullName
+          $env:JAVA_HOME = $env:GRAALVM_HOME
+          # Export to subsequent steps
+          "GRAALVM_HOME=$env:GRAALVM_HOME" >> $env:GITHUB_ENV
+          "JAVA_HOME=$env:JAVA_HOME" >> $env:GITHUB_ENV
+          "PATH=$env:GRAALVM_HOME\bin;$env:PATH" >> $env:GITHUB_PATH
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: clippy,rustfmt
@@ -47,6 +58,16 @@ jobs:
         shell: pwsh
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Install GraalVM CE 23 and set JAVA_HOME/GRAALVM_HOME

+          choco install graalvm-ce-java23 -y
+          $graal = Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files\GraalVM" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
+          if (-not $graal) { throw "GraalVM not found after install" }
+          $env:GRAALVM_HOME = $graal.FullName
+          $env:JAVA_HOME = $env:GRAALVM_HOME
+          "GRAALVM_HOME=$env:GRAALVM_HOME" >> $env:GITHUB_ENV
+          "JAVA_HOME=$env:JAVA_HOME" >> $env:GITHUB_ENV
+          "PATH=$env:GRAALVM_HOME\bin;$env:PATH" >> $env:GITHUB_PATH
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: clippy,rustfmt
@@ -90,6 +111,16 @@ jobs:
         shell: pwsh
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Install GraalVM CE 23 and set JAVA_HOME/GRAALVM_HOME
+        run: |
+          choco install graalvm-ce-java23 -y
+          $graal = Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files\GraalVM" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
+          if (-not $graal) { throw "GraalVM not found after install" }
+          $env:GRAALVM_HOME = $graal.FullName
+          $env:JAVA_HOME = $env:GRAALVM_HOME
+          "GRAALVM_HOME=$env:GRAALVM_HOME" >> $env:GITHUB_ENV
+          "JAVA_HOME=$env:JAVA_HOME" >> $env:GITHUB_ENV
+          "PATH=$env:GRAALVM_HOME\bin;$env:PATH" >> $env:GITHUB_PATH
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: clippy,rustfmt
